iti17:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti17:2.1:
“Monks, with regard to external factors,
I don’t envision any other single factor like friendship with admirable people as doing so much for a monk in training,
who has not attained the heart’s aspiration but remains intent on the unsurpassed safety from bondage.
iti17:2.2: A monk who is a friend with admirable people abandons what is unskillful and develops what is skillful.”
iti17:3.1: A monk who’s a friend to admirable people
